issues.description: 术语“BEOL”在译文中被意译为“后端金属层电阻”，但未提供英文全称及中文释义的首次注释。
译文“这意味着在实现相同电阻值时，其所需面积仅为后者的约1%”略显冗长，且“后者”指代不够直接。
术语“PDK”在译文中被译为“工艺设计套件（PDK）”，但未遵循“英文全称（中文释义）”的格式，且“工艺设计套件”是常见译法，但“套件”一词在半导体语境下略显宽泛。
译文“即使在单个芯片上，也可能在热点附近部署数千个此类传感器”中的“部署”一词，在硬件语境下略显生硬。
译文“三星通过提高基准电阻值来补偿这一不足”中的“基准电阻值”翻译不够准确。原文“base resistance”在此语境下更可能指“基础电阻”或“电阻基值”，而非一个“基准”参考值。
译文将冒号后的解释拆分为两个句子，逻辑清晰，但“以捕捉波形中对温度敏感的部分”中的“捕捉”一词，在电路动作描述上可以更精确。
译文“基于紧凑型环形振荡器（RO）的TDC”处理得当。但“RO”作为“Ring Oscillator”的缩写，在全文术语表中未列出，且在本章节首次出现。
译文“此前的温度传感器通常只能在面积或速度其中一项上进行优化”准确，但“通常”一词为译者添加，虽符合常识，但原文未明确此概率。

paragraphs.source: Samsung presented a compact temperature sensor on SF2, replacing the traditional bipolar junction transistor (BJT) approach with a BEOL metal resistor. This may not be as flashy as the next generation of memory or processors, but it is essential to making chips work.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Samsung presented a compact temperature sensor on SF2, replacing the traditional bipolar junction transistor (BJT) approach with a BEOL metal resistor. This may not be as flashy as the next generation of memory or processors, but it is essential to making chips work.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Samsung presented a compact temperature sensor on SF2, replacing the traditional bipolar junction transistor (BJT) approach with a BEOL metal resistor. This may not be as flashy as the next generation of memory or processors, but it is essential to making chips work.

pro.text: 三星在SF2工艺上展示了一款紧凑型温度传感器，它用后端金属层（BEOL， Back-End-of-Line）电阻取代了传统的双极结型晶体管方案。这可能不如下一代内存或处理器那样引人注目，但对于芯片的正常工作却至关重要。

paragraphs.source: The metal resistor offers 518× higher sheet resistance than an equivalent routing metal, requiring roughly 1% of the area for the same resistance. As it sits in the upper metal layers, it leaves plenty of room for any circuitry underneath and eliminates FEOL area overhead. Although it has a low resolution, the benefits more than make up for it.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The metal resistor offers 518× higher sheet resistance than an equivalent routing metal, requiring roughly 1% of the area for the same resistance. As it sits in the upper metal layers, it leaves plenty of room for any circuitry underneath and eliminates FEOL area overhead. Although it has a low resolution, the benefits more than make up for it.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The metal resistor offers 518× higher sheet resistance than an equivalent routing metal, requiring roughly 1% of the area for the same resistance. As it sits in the upper metal layers, it leaves plenty of room for any circuitry underneath and eliminates FEOL area overhead. Although it has a low resolution, the benefits more than make up for it.

pro.text: 该金属电阻的方块电阻比等效布线金属高出518倍，因此实现相同电阻值所需面积仅为后者的约1%。由于它位于上层金属层中，为下方任何电路都留出了充足空间，并消除了前端工艺的面积开销。尽管其分辨率较低，但其带来的优势足以弥补这一不足。

paragraphs.source: The sensor uses a fully stacked capacitor-resistor-circuit structure with a total area of just 625 μm². As a characterized PDK element, its behavior is modeled by the foundry and validated. It is more suitable for mass production, where process variation must be tightly controlled. Even on a single chip, thousands of these sensors may be used near hotspots.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The sensor uses a fully stacked capacitor-resistor-circuit structure with a total area of just 625 μm². As a characterized PDK element, its behavior is modeled by the foundry and validated. It is more suitable for mass production, where process variation must be tightly controlled. Even on a single chip, thousands of these sensors may be used near hotspots.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The sensor uses a fully stacked capacitor-resistor-circuit structure with a total area of just 625 μm². As a characterized PDK element, its behavior is modeled by the foundry and validated. It is more suitable for mass production, where process variation must be tightly controlled. Even on a single chip, thousands of these sensors may be used near hotspots.

pro.text: 该传感器采用全堆叠的电容-电阻-电路结构，总面积仅为625 μm²。作为一个经过特性表征的工艺设计套件（PDK， Process Design Kit）元件，其行为由晶圆代工厂建模并验证。这种设计更适用于需要严格控制工艺偏差的大规模生产。即使在单个芯片上，热点附近也可能使用数千个此类传感器。

issues.description: 术语“BEOL”在译文中被意译为“后端金属层电阻”，但未提供英文全称及中文释义的首次注释。

译文将冒号后的解释拆分为两个句子，逻辑清晰，但“以捕捉波形中对温度敏感的部分”中的“捕捉”一词，在电路动作描述上可以更精确。
译文“基于紧凑型环形振荡器（RO）的TDC”处理得当。但“RO”作为“Ring Oscillator”的缩写，在全文术语表中未列出，且在本章节首次出现。
译文“此前的温度传感器通常只能在面积或速度其中一项上进行优化”准确，但“通常”一词为译者添加，虽符合常识，但原文未明确此概率。

paragraphs.source: As mentioned earlier, the metal resistors have a lower temperature coefficient of resistance (TCR), just 0.2× that of routing metal — which limits sensing resolution. Samsung compensates for this by increasing the base resistance. However, this slows sensing time as the RC time constant grows. To address this, Samsung uses a time-offset compression technique: a low-resistance (0.1R) fast-charge path rapidly charges the RC filter, then the circuit switches to the full resistance for the temperature-sensitive portion of the waveform.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As mentioned earlier, the metal resistors have a lower temperature coefficient of resistance (TCR), just 0.2× that of routing metal — which limits sensing resolution. Samsung compensates for this by increasing the base resistance. However, this slows sensing time as the RC time constant grows. To address this, Samsung uses a time-offset compression technique: a low-resistance (0.1R) fast-charge path rapidly charges the RC filter, then the circuit switches to the full resistance for the temperature-sensitive portion of the waveform.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As mentioned earlier, the metal resistors have a lower temperature coefficient of resistance (TCR), just 0.2× that of routing metal — which limits sensing resolution. Samsung compensates for this by increasing the base resistance. However, this slows sensing time as the RC time constant grows. To address this, Samsung uses a time-offset compression technique: a low-resistance (0.1R) fast-charge path rapidly charges the RC filter, then the circuit switches to the full resistance for the temperature-sensitive portion of the waveform.

pro.text: 如前所述，金属层电阻的电阻温度系数（TCR）较低，仅为布线金属的0.2倍——这限制了传感分辨率。三星通过增大基础电阻值来补偿这一不足。然而，这会导致RC时间常数增大，从而拖慢传感速度。为了解决这个问题，三星采用了一种时间偏移压缩技术：首先通过一条低电阻（0.1R）的快速充电路径为RC滤波器快速充电，随后电路切换到全电阻值，用于测量波形中对温度敏感的部分。

issues.description: 术语“BEOL”在译文中被意译为“后端金属层电阻”，但未提供英文全称及中文释义的首次注释。
译文“这意味着在实现相同电阻值时，其所需面积仅为后者的约1%”略显冗长，且“后者”指代不够直接。
术语“PDK”在译文中被译为“工艺设计套件（PDK）”，但未遵循“英文全称（中文释义）”的格式，且“工艺设计套件”是常见译法，但“套件”一词在半导体语境下略显宽泛。
译文“即使在单个芯片上，也可能在热点附近部署数千个此类传感器”中的“部署”一词，在硬件语境下略显生硬。
译文“三星通过提高基准电阻值来补偿这一不足”中的“基准电阻值”翻译不够准确。原文“base resistance”在此语境下更可能指“基础电阻”或“电阻基值”，而非一个“基准”参考值。
译文将冒号后的解释拆分为两个句子，逻辑清晰，但“以捕捉波形中对温度敏感的部分”中的“捕捉”一词，在电路动作描述上可以更精确。
译文“基于紧凑型环形振荡器（RO）的TDC”处理得当。但“RO”作为“Ring Oscillator”的缩写，在全文术语表中未列出，且在本章节首次出现。
译文“此前的温度传感器通常只能在面积或速度其中一项上进行优化”准确，但“通常”一词为译者添加，虽符合常识，但原文未明确此概率。

paragraphs.source: For the time-to-digital conversion (TDC), they replaced the large linear delay generator used in prior work with a compact ring oscillator-based (RO) TDC, cutting delay generator area by 99.1%. The RO also doubles as the system clock, with phase-interleaved counting preventing non-monotonicity.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For the time-to-digital conversion (TDC), they replaced the large linear delay generator used in prior work with a compact ring oscillator-based (RO) TDC, cutting delay generator area by 99.1%. The RO also doubles as the system clock, with phase-interleaved counting preventing non-monotonicity.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For the time-to-digital conversion (TDC), they replaced the large linear delay generator used in prior work with a compact ring oscillator-based (RO) TDC, cutting delay generator area by 99.1%. The RO also doubles as the system clock, with phase-interleaved counting preventing non-monotonicity.

pro.text: 在时间数字转换器（TDC）部分，他们用一款基于紧凑型环形振荡器（RO， Ring Oscillator）的TDC取代了先前工作中使用的大型线性延迟发生器，将延迟发生器的面积削减了99.1%。该环形振荡器还兼任系统时钟，并通过相位交错计数避免了非单调性问题。

paragraphs.source: The new temperature sensor has an accuracy figure of merit (FoM) of 0.017 nJ·%², improving upon prior work on Samsung 5LPE, TSMC N3E and Intel 4 (JSSC 2025). Prior temperature sensors could only optimize for one of these: area or speed. The sensor on N3E was small, at 900 μm² but took 1 ms, while the sensor on Samsung 5LPE was fast, at 12 μs but huge, at 6356 μm².
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The new temperature sensor has an accuracy figure of merit (FoM) of 0.017 nJ·%², improving upon prior work on Samsung 5LPE, TSMC N3E and Intel 4 (JSSC 2025). Prior temperature sensors could only optimize for one of these: area or speed. The sensor on N3E was small, at 900 μm² but took 1 ms, while the sensor on Samsung 5LPE was fast, at 12 μs but huge, at 6356 μm².
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The new temperature sensor has an accuracy figure of merit (FoM) of 0.017 nJ·%², improving upon prior work on Samsung 5LPE, TSMC N3E and Intel 4 (JSSC 2025). Prior temperature sensors could only optimize for one of these: area or speed. The sensor on N3E was small, at 900 μm² but took 1 ms, while the sensor on Samsung 5LPE was fast, at 12 μs but huge, at 6356 μm².

pro.text: 这款新型温度传感器的精度品质因数（FoM）为0.017 nJ·%²，优于先前基于三星5LPE、台积电N3E和英特尔4工艺（JSSC 2025）的工作。此前的温度传感器只能在面积或速度其中一项上进行优化。例如，台积电N3E上的传感器面积很小（900 μm²），但转换时间长达1毫秒；而三星5LPE上的传感器速度很快（12微秒），但面积巨大（6356 μm²）。
